steps.title: Identify the system on the graph
steps.content: The graph shows two equations: a linear equation (the straight line) and a nonlinear equation (the curved line). The solution to the system is where these curves intersect.

steps.title: Read the intersection coordinates from the grid
steps.content: The two curves meet at a single point. Reading from the coordinate grid: the intersection occurs at $x = 3$ and $y = 5$. The solution is the point $(3, 5)$, which matches Choice C — $(3, 5)$ is correct.
